nasb.text: Then he sent out a dove from him, to see if the water was abated from the face of the land;

esv.text: Then he sent forth a dove from him, to see if the waters had subsided from the face of the ground.

cnv.text: 他又放了一隻鴿子出去，要看看水從地上退了沒有。

ccb.text: 后来，挪亚放出一只鸽子，以便了解地面的水是否已经消退。

csbs.text: 他又从他那里放出一只鸽子，要看看水是否从地面上消退了。
